title: Warming Glow applies Hit Dice Rolls plus one while equipped

plan.title: Warming Glow applies Hit Dice Rolls plus one while equipped
plan.summary: Equip Warming Glow to a primary creature and verify battle uses one additional Hit Dice Roll.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so the extra Hit Dice Roll comes only from Warming Glow.

steps: Player 1 plays Warming Glow and equips it to their primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle with the equipped creature attacking.
Inspect the hit roll dice count.

expectedAssertions.label: Hit roll used three dice after the +1 Hit Dice Roll bonus

manualVerification: Confirm the extra Hit Dice Roll applies only while Warming Glow remains equipped.
riskNotes: Uses battle hit roll dice length as the observable output.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Warming Glow equipped Hit Dice Roll modifier.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
